message:
test(config): reject unixsocketperm runtime mutation

frankenredis-ddl1

files.patch:
@@ -772,6 +772,20 @@
         "value": "ERR CONFIG SET failed (possibly related to argument 'unixsocket') - can't set immutable config"
       }
     },
+    {
+      "name": "config_set_unixsocketperm_immutable",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "CONFIG",
+        "SET",
+        "unixsocketperm",
+        "700"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR CONFIG SET failed (possibly related to argument 'unixsocketperm') - can't set immutable config"
+      }
+    },
     {
       "name": "config_set_daemonize_immutable",
       "now_ms": 0,
